title: Tender Boy
overview: Noah and Cody, two young men searching for direction in their lives, form a quiet but powerful bond as their friendship gradually turns into romance. While navigating the pressures of family expectations, social environments, and their own uncertainties about the future, they begin to confront what it means to love openly and honestly. Moments of tenderness and vulnerability shape their relationship, forcing both to face fears about identity, commitment, and belonging. As their connection deepens, each must decide how much they are willing to risk to live authentically and protect the fragile yet transformative love growing between them.
